ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* The date for which the stock data is recorded */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* The opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* The closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* The highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* The lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* The trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* A unique identifier for the stock */,
  "adjusted_close_price" TEXT /* The adjusted closing price accounting for splits and dividends */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the stock on the given date */,
  "pe_ratio" TEXT /* The Price-to-Earnings ratio of the stock on the given date */,
  "dividend" TEXT /* The dividend payment for the stock on the given date */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The currency in which the prices are quoted */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_code" TEXT /* A unique identifier for the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* The name of the stock */,
  "market" TEXT /* The market in which the stock is listed */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry to which the stock belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the stock and its company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector to which the stock belongs */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country of the stock's headquarters */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* The exchange code where the stock is listed */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  "website" TEXT /* The website of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* The name of the CEO of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_code")
)
column_names: The date for which the stock data is recorded
The opening price of the stock on the given date
